Claim Allo Points

Register on Allo App and go to “RWArds” in the side navigation.

Connect your Metamask wallet address.

Track your status

You will see your points and rank on Allo RWArds dashboard as soon we have updated the Allo database, typically within 48h.

Allo is a decentralized protocol for launching real world assets. It allows instant global settlement for investing and trading assets such as SAFTs, Real estate, Treasury bills, Venture capital, luxury assets, and more.
